title: Special Mum & Dad Memorial Heart Ornament with Diamantes & Pink Rose – Stone-Effect Standing Grave Plaque Ornament with Inscription – Graveside, Cemetery & Garden Remembrance Tribute Keepsake
features: HEARTFELT REMEMBRANCE – A Special Mum & Dad memorial heart, inscribed with “Forever in the hearts & minds of the loving family you left behind.” A gentle, family-focused tribute for a grave, headstone, cemetery plot or memorial garden

STONE-EFFECT DETAILING – Light grey speckled finish with dark engraved-style lettering; painted pink rose with green stem on the left, plus an embossed floral cluster on the right set with sparkling diamante accents for a respectful shimmer

DURABLE POLYRESIN – Strong, weather-resistant construction designed for year-round outdoor use in cemeteries and remembrance gardens; equally suitable for indoor display on a mantel, shelf or memory table
COMPACT & PRACTICAL SIZE – Measures approx. W14cm x L12.5cm x D6.5cm; weight ~270g. The flat base sits securely beside a headstone, grave vase or plaque and is easy to reposition when tending flowers
GIFT-BOXED SYMPATHY PRESENT – Supplied in a printed box for safe storage and presentation; a thoughtful condolence gift and lasting keepsake for remembering beloved parents with dignity and care
LOW-MAINTENANCE CARE – Smooth speckled surface wipes clean in seconds to help keep the resting place neat alongside fresh or artificial flowers, lanterns and other cemetery ornaments
description: Created for thoughtful remembrance, this Special Mum & Dad Memorial Heart offers a warm, family-focused tribute for the graveside or a quiet memorial space at home. The front bears the comforting inscription: “Forever in the hearts & minds of the loving family you left behind.” The sentiment is set in dark engraved-style lettering that is clear and respectful to read from a considerate distance. The heart features a classic stone-effect speckled grey finish. A hand-painted pink rose with green stem and leaves adds gentle colour on the left, while the right side has an embossed floral spray embellished with sparkling diamante accents that catch the light without overwhelming the message. This timeless styling blends naturally beside headstones, plaques, vases and floral arrangements. Made from sturdy, weather-resistant polyresin , the ornament is designed for year-round outdoor display in cemeteries and remembrance gardens yet is equally suited to indoor settings.
